text: Split Bill helps friends split a shared bill. No accounts needed.
Alex adds items with tax and tip, and invites Sam and Jordan to the bill.
Payment details are encrypted in the browser before anything is saved.
Alex opens his dashboard to track who has claimed and paid.
He copies the share link so friends can open it on their phones.
Sam opens the link and picks his name from the roster.
Sam claims the pizza and splits it with two people.
His share unlocks the payer's PayPal details — decrypted only in his browser.
Jordan joins the same split so each person owes half the pizza.
Alex sees per-item progress bars and can mark someone paid when the money arrives.
Jordan can also tap I've paid to notify Alex directly.
The dashboard updates — two of two people paid.
Restaurants can build bills from a searchable menu — like Dal Bhat in Berlin.
